plan_overview: Refactor the test suite to follow Kent C. Dodds' Testing Trophy philosophy. Focus on fixing broken tests, removing duplication, reducing noise, and strengthening weak tests. Priority: fix issues, then improve quality. See e2e-coverage-plan.md for comprehensive E2E test coverage by feature.
technical_context: Vitest for unit/integration, Playwright for E2E. testEditor.ts is a helper that creates headless Lexical editors for integration tests. TEST_ID_GENERATORS provide stable selectors for E2E tests.

tasks.description: Fix failing lexicalToUsfm.test.ts test - 'should handle nested element nodes with children'
steps: Read src/app/domain/editor/serialization/lexicalToUsfm.ts to understand buildSidContentMapForChapter
Analyze what nodes the test creates vs what the function actually produces
Determine if test expectation is wrong (test bug) or implementation changed
Fix the test or file an issue if implementation is wrong
Run pnpm test:unit src/test/app/lexicalToUsfm.test.ts to confirm pass

tasks.description: Fix un-awaited promise warning in WebHandles.test.ts:773
steps: Read line 773 of WebHandles.test.ts
Add await to the expect().resolves assertion
Run pnpm test:unit src/test/persistence/WebHandles.test.ts to confirm no warnings
Lines 8-22 and 24-39 are identical except for console.log
Delete the duplicate test (lines 24-39)
Keep one clean version without console.log
Run pnpm test:unit src/test/unit/testEditor.test.ts to confirm pass
Add vi.spyOn(console, 'error').mockImplementation(() => {}) in beforeEach
Or update mocks to not throw/log during expected error paths
Run pnpm test:unit to confirm cleaner output

tasks.description: Strengthen ProjectIndexer.test.ts - currently only tests method signatures
steps: Read src/app/domain/project/ProjectIndexer.ts to understand what it does
Replace signature tests with actual behavior tests
Test that indexProject actually calls repository methods with correct data
OR delete tests if ProjectIndexer is covered by integration tests elsewhere
Assess if tests are refactor-friendly (would they break if internals changed?)
Check if tests verify observable behavior vs internal state
Document findings - may be acceptable due to Lexical's architecture
No changes required if tests are appropriate for editor testing

tasks.description: Update testing skill with patterns discovered during refactor
steps: Add note about testEditor.ts helper pattern for Lexical testing
Add note about TEST_ID_GENERATORS testing for E2E stability
Document any anti-patterns found and removed
